questions.question: Ek security professional ke liye soft skills kyun important hain?

options.B: Client aur public se achhe relations maintain karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf technical knowledge hi matter karta hai.
options.D: Isse kaam jaldi khatam ho jata hai.

questions.explanation: Soft skills security professionals ko client aur public ke saath effective communication aur better relations banane mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Ek security guard ki uniform kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Clean, ironed aur properly fitted.

questions.explanation: Ek professional security guard ki uniform hamesha saaf, press ki hui aur sahi fit wali honi chahiye, jo ek respectable image banati hai.

questions.question: Duty par time par pahunchna kis soft skill ka hissa hai?

options.B: Punctuality.

questions.explanation: Duty par samay par pahunchna punctuality kehlata hai, jo ek professional ki important quality hai.

questions.question: Visitor ko greet karte samay aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unse gusse se baat karni chahiye.
options.C: Smile ke saath polite 'Namaste' ya 'Good Morning' kehna chahiye.
options.D: Unhe seedhe andar jane dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Visitor ko polite tareeke se greet karna unko welcome feel karata hai aur ek positive impression chhodta hai.

questions.question: Apne appearance ko maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Professionalism aur discipline dikhane ke liye.
options.C: Taki log aapko serious na le.
options.D: Isse duty jaldi khatam ho jati hai.

questions.explanation: Ek neat aur tidy appearance professionalism aur discipline ko darshata hai, jo security sector mein bahut important hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Assets aur logo ki safety aur security ensure karna.

questions.explanation: Security professional ka mukhya kaam property, assets aur wahan maujood logon ki suraksha aur safety ko یقینی banana hai.

questions.question: Duty par mobile phone ka excessive use kaisa behaviour hai?

options.B: Acceptable.

questions.explanation: Duty par mobile phone ka zyada istemal dhyan bhatkata hai aur unprofessional behaviour maana jata hai.

questions.question: Personal hygiene maintain karna ek security professional ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Dusron par positive impression banane aur health maintain karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Achhi personal hygiene se aap healthy rehte hain aur dusron par ek positive aur respectable impression padta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko duty par koi important information milti hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne doston ko bata dena chahiye.
options.C: Turant apne supervisor ko report karna chahiye.
options.D: Social media par post kar dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Important information ko turant apne supervisor ko report karna zaroori hai, taki sahi action liya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko apni body language kaisi rakhni chahiye?

options.B: Alert aur confident.

questions.explanation: Ek security guard ki body language alert aur confident honi chahiye, jo unki authority aur vigilance ko darshati hai.

questions.question: Duty ke dauran neend aana ya jhapki lena kaisa behaviour hai?

options.B: Acceptable, agar koi nahi dekh raha ho.

questions.explanation: Duty par neend aana ya jhapki lena bahut unprofessional aur risky hai, kyunki isse security compromise ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko apne knowledge aur skills ko kaise update karte rehna chahiye?

options.B: Training sessions attend karke aur naye rules seekhkar.

questions.explanation: Apne knowledge aur skills ko update rakhne ke liye training sessions mein participate karna aur naye security protocols ko samajhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko duty par koi anjaan packet milta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usko khol kar check karna chahiye.
options.B: Usko dustbin mein fenk dena chahiye.
options.C: Usko touch na karein aur turant supervisor ko inform karein.
options.D: Usko apne paas rakh lena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Anjaan packets ko kabhi bhi touch nahi karna chahiye, kyunki wo dangerous ho sakte hain. Turant supervisor ko inform karein aur unke instructions follow karein.

questions.question: Kisi incident ke baad report likhna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Future reference aur investigation ke liye.
options.D: Kisi ko blame karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Incident reports future reference, investigation aur management ko sahi decision lene mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Apne kaam ke prati 'commitment' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf salary ke liye kaam karna.
options.B: Apni responsibilities ko poori dedication aur sincerity se nibhana.
options.C: Jab mann kare tab kaam karna.
options.D: Dusron ke kaam mein interfere karna.

questions.explanation: Commitment ka matlab hai apne kaam aur responsibilities ko poori lagan aur imandari se karna.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'discretion' (vivek) ka use kab karna chahiye?

options.B: Har situation mein, especially sensitive matters mein.
options.C: Sirf jab koi senior na ho.

questions.explanation: Discretion ka matlab hai sensitive situations ko samajhdari aur guptata ke saath handle karna, jahan rules ko strictly apply karna theek na ho.

questions.question: Agar aapki shift khatam hone wali hai aur aapko ek suspicious activity dikhti hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Shift khatam hone ka wait karna chahiye.
options.B: Ignore karke chale jana chahiye.
options.C: Turant investigate karein aur apne supervisor ko inform karein, bhale hi shift extend ho.
options.D: Dusre guard ke aane ka wait karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Security ek continuous process hai. Agar shift khatam hone wali ho tab bhi, kisi bhi suspicious activity ko turant address karna aur report karna professional duty hai.

questions.question: Effective communication mein sabse important kya hai?

options.B: Clear aur concise message dena.

questions.explanation: Effective communication ke liye zaroori hai ki message clear, short aur seedha ho, taki sunne wale ko aasani se samajh aa sake.

questions.question: Non-verbal communication mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Likhna.
options.C: Body language, facial expressions aur eye contact.

questions.explanation: Non-verbal communication mein body language, chehre ke expressions aur aankhon ka contact shamil hote hain, jo bina bole bahut kuch bata dete hain.

questions.question: Active listening ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf sunna aur koi reaction na dena.
options.B: Speaker ki baat ko dhyan se sunna aur samajhne ki koshish karna.

questions.explanation: Active listening mein speaker ki baat ko poore dhyan se sunna, usko samajhna aur sahi feedback dena shamil hai.

questions.question: Kisi visitor ko directions dete samay aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek word mein jawab dena.
options.B: Clear, precise aur polite instructions dena.
options.D: Unko khud se dhundhne ke liye kehna.

questions.explanation: Visitors ko sahi aur clear directions dene se unka time bachcha hai aur organization ka positive impression banta hai.

questions.question: Security incident report likhte samay kaun si cheez sabse important hai?

options.B: Facts ko clearly aur accurately likhna.

questions.explanation: Incident reports mein facts ko clear aur accurate tareeke se likhna bahut zaroori hai, taki koi galatfahami na ho aur sahi action liya ja sake.

questions.question: Walkie-talkie par baat karte samay aapko kya yaad rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Jitna ho sake utna fast bolna.
options.B: Clear voice aur short sentences use karna.

questions.explanation: Walkie-talkie par clear voice mein aur short sentences mein baat karne se message aasani se pahunchta hai aur confusion nahi hota.

questions.question: Agar koi aapko gusse mein kuch keh raha hai, toh aapko kaise react karna chahiye?

options.A: Usko bhi gusse mein jawab dena chahiye.
options.B: Uski baat ko ignore karna chahiye.
options.C: Calm rehkar uski baat ko sunna chahiye aur fir polite tareeke se jawab dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Gusse wale logon se deal karte samay shant rehna aur unki baat sunna zaroori hai, taki situation control mein rahe aur badhe na.

questions.question: Aapki 'tone of voice' (bolne ka tareeka) communication mein kya role play karti hai?

options.B: Yeh aapki personality ko reflect karti hai.
options.C: Yeh aapke message ke meaning ko change kar sakti hai.
options.D: Sirf aapke mood ko batati hai.

questions.explanation: Tone of voice aapke message ka meaning badal sakti hai. Ek hi baat ko alag tone mein bolne se uska asar alag ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Security breach ke baare mein inform karte samay, aapko kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Emotions aur speculation.

questions.explanation: Security breach jaise sensitive matters mein, emotions aur speculation ki bajaye sirf facts par focus karna chahiye, taki sahi aur objective information di ja sake.

questions.question: Ek effective 'handover' (shift change) mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.A: Dusre guard ko jaldi se bhej dena.
options.B: Saari important information, pending tasks aur incidents ko clear tareeke se convey karna.

questions.explanation: Effective handover mein aane wale guard ko saari zaroori information, jaise ki pending tasks, incidents aur special instructions, clearly batana shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar koi person aapki baat nahi samajh pa raha hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne message ko alag tareeke se ya simple words mein repeat karna chahiye.
options.D: Usse baat karna band kar dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar koi aapki baat nahi samajh pa raha hai, toh apne message ko simple words mein ya alag tareeke se repeat karna chahiye, taki communication clear ho.

questions.question: Emails ya written communication mein professionalism kaise maintain karein?

options.B: Grammar aur spelling mistakes ignore karke.
options.C: Clear subject line, polite tone aur proper grammar ka use karke.

questions.explanation: Professional emails mein clear subject line, polite tone, correct grammar aur spelling ka dhyan rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Kisi senior officer se baat karte samay aapki communication style kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Respectful aur clear.

questions.explanation: Seniors se baat karte samay respectful aur clear communication style adopt karna chahiye, taki unko sahi information mile aur aapki respect bani rahe.

questions.question: Aapki 'eye contact' communication mein kya darshati hai?

options.B: Disinterest.

questions.explanation: Appropriate eye contact confidence, honesty aur attention ko darshata hai, jo effective communication ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi instruction samajh nahi aayi, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Pretend karna chahiye ki samajh aa gayi hai.
options.B: Usko ignore kar dena chahiye.
options.C: Clarification ke liye polite tareeke se poochhna chahiye.
options.D: Apne hisab se kaam karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar koi instruction samajh nahi aayi, toh clarification ke liye poochhna better hai, taki koi galti na ho.

questions.question: Aapki physical posture (khade hone ka tareeka) communication mein kya impact dalta hai?

options.B: Yeh aapko thaka hua dikhata hai.
options.C: Yeh aapki authority aur professionalism ko convey karta hai.
options.D: Yeh aapko chhupane mein help karta hai.

questions.explanation: Ek upright aur confident posture aapki professionalism aur authority ko darshata hai, jo security role mein bahut important hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko public se communicate karte samay kaun sa approach apnaana chahiye?

options.B: Friendly aur casual.
options.C: Professional, respectful aur firm jab zaroori ho.

questions.explanation: Public se interact karte samay professional aur respectful rehna chahiye, lekin zaroorat padne par firm bhi hona chahiye, taki rules follow ho sakein.

questions.question: Customer service security professionals ke liye kyun important hai?

options.A: Kyunki security ka kaam sirf customer service hai.
options.B: Yeh security ko support karta hai aur positive public image banata hai.
options.C: Isse kaam mein der hoti hai.

questions.explanation: Achhi customer service security ko support karti hai aur organization ki public image ko behtar banati hai, jisse log security par trust karte hain.

questions.question: Ek 'difficult customer' ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Unhe ignore karna chahiye.
options.C: Calmly sunna chahiye, empathy dikhani chahiye aur solution offer karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Difficult customers ko shanti se sunna, unki feelings ko samajhna aur unki problem ka solution nikalne ki koshish karna sabse achha tareeka hai.

questions.question: Empathy ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Dusron ki feelings ko ignore karna.
options.B: Dusron ki feelings ko samajhna aur unke perspective se dekhna.
options.C: Sirf apni feelings par focus karna.

questions.explanation: Empathy ka matlab hai dusre vyakti ki feelings ko samajhna aur unki situation ko unke nazariye se dekhne ki koshish karna.

questions.question: Agar koi visitor galat jagah par hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usko daant kar wahan se bhaga dena chahiye.
options.B: Politely unko sahi jagah par guide karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Visitors ko polite tareeke se sahi jagah par guide karna achhi customer service ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Conflict de-escalation ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Tension ko kam karna aur peaceful resolution nikalna.

questions.explanation: Conflict de-escalation ka mukhya uddeshya hai tension ko kam karna aur situation ko shanti se suljhana, taki violence ya aggression na ho.

questions.question: Public relations (PR) mein ek security professional ka kya role hai?

options.B: Organization ki positive image maintain karna aur public trust banana.

questions.explanation: Security professionals public ke saath interact karte hain, isliye unka behaviour organization ki public image par seedha asar dalta hai. Positive interaction se trust banta hai.

questions.question: Ek positive attitude security professional ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf achha feel karne ke liye.
options.B: Isse log aapko serious nahi lenge.
options.C: Yeh stress ko kam karta hai aur dusron par positive impact dalta hai.

questions.explanation: Ek positive attitude aapko stress se nipatne mein madad karta hai aur aapke colleagues aur public par achha asar dalta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi visitor 'unreasonable demand' karta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Turant uski baat maan leni chahiye.
options.B: Politely explain karna chahiye ki yeh possible nahi hai aur rules batane chahiye.

questions.explanation: Unreasonable demands ko politely decline karna chahiye aur rules ko explain karna chahiye, bina kisi confrontation ke.

questions.question: Kisi emergency situation mein, aapka customer service approach kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Calm, reassuring aur authoritative.

questions.explanation: Emergency mein, shant rehna, logon ko ashwasan dena aur clear instructions dena zaroori hai, taki log safe rahein aur panic na ho.

questions.question: Feedback ko kaise receive karna chahiye?

options.B: Ignore karke.
options.C: Open-minded hokar aur improvement ke liye use karke.

questions.explanation: Feedback ko constructive tareeke se lena chahiye aur usko apni performance ko behtar banane ke liye use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kisi se 'apologize' (maafi maangna) karna kab zaroori hota hai?

options.B: Jab aapne koi galti ki ho ya kisi ko hurt kiya ho.

questions.explanation: Agar aapne koi galti ki hai ya kisi ko anjaane mein hurt kiya hai, toh maafi maangna situation ko theek karne aur relations ko sudharne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'patience' (dhairya) kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Difficult situations aur logon ko handle karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Patience security professionals ke liye bahut zaroori hai, especially jab difficult logon ya stressful situations se deal karna ho.

questions.question: Agar koi person aapko 'wrongly accuse' (galat ilzam) karta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usko bhi wapas accuse karna chahiye.
options.B: Calmly aur clearly apni side explain karni chahiye.

questions.explanation: Galat ilzam lagne par shant rehkar apni baat ko clear aur logical tareeke se samjhana chahiye, bina gussa hue.

questions.question: Ek security guard 'brand ambassador' kaise ban sakta hai?

options.B: Apne professional behaviour aur excellent customer service se.
options.C: Social media par company ka promotion karke.

questions.explanation: Ek security guard apne professional behaviour aur achhi customer service se organization ki positive image banata hai, aur ek tarah se brand ambassador ka kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Kisi visitor ko 'turn down' (mana) karte samay aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Politely, reasons ke saath mana karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Kisi visitor ko mana karte samay polite rehna aur reasons explain karna zaroori hai, taki wo offended feel na karein.

questions.question: Aapki 'verbal and non-verbal cues' customer service mein kya role play karti hain?

options.B: Yeh aapke message ko support ya contradict kar sakti hain.
options.C: Yeh sirf aapko distract karti hain.
options.D: Yeh sirf aapki intelligence dikhati hain.

questions.explanation: Aapke verbal aur non-verbal cues aapke message ko reinforce kar sakte hain ya uske against ja sakte hain. Ek positive body language aapke polite words ko support karti hai.

questions.question: Kisi emergency mein, public ko evacuate karte samay aapka communication style kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Calm, clear aur firm instructions ke saath.

questions.explanation: Emergency evacuation ke dauran shant rehna, clear aur firm instructions dena zaroori hai, taki log panic na karein aur safely nikal sakein.

questions.question: Teamwork ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek common goal achieve karne ke liye saath milkar kaam karna.
options.C: Dusron ke kaam mein interfere karna.
options.D: Apne hi ideas ko follow karna.

questions.explanation: Teamwork mein sab log ek common goal ko achieve karne ke liye ek saath milkar kaam karte hain.

questions.question: Ek achhi team mein 'cooperation' kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Tasks ko efficiently complete karne aur smooth operations ke liye.
options.D: Dusron par depend karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Cooperation se team ke tasks efficiently complete hote hain aur overall operations smooth rehte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko apne senior se koi instruction milti hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko follow karna chahiye.
options.D: Dusron se poochhna chahiye ki kya karein.

questions.explanation: Seniors ki instructions ko follow karna discipline aur teamwork ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Ek security team mein 'clear communication' kyun important hai?

options.B: Taki sabko pata ho ki kya karna hai aur koi galti na ho.

questions.explanation: Clear communication se sabhi team members ko apne roles aur responsibilities pata hoti hain, jisse galti hone ki sambhavna kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Leadership quality mein 'initiative' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bina kahe kaam shuru karna ya problem solve karne ki koshish karna.

questions.explanation: Initiative ka matlab hai bina kisi ke kahe, khud se kaam shuru karna ya problems ko solve karne ki koshish karna.

questions.question: Agar aapka colleague help maangta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Agar possible ho toh help karni chahiye.

questions.explanation: Colleagues ki help karna teamwork aur mutual support ko badhawa deta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'responsible' team member ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Apni duties ko seriously lena aur unhe poora karna.
options.D: Sirf apne fayde ke liye kaam karna.

questions.explanation: Responsible team member apni duties ko seriously leta hai aur unhe poori imandari se nibhata hai.

questions.question: Team mein 'trust' kaise build hota hai?

options.B: Honesty, reliability aur consistent performance se.

questions.explanation: Team mein trust imandari, bharosemand hone aur consistently achhi performance dene se banta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko team mein koi 'conflict' (jagra) dikhta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko ignore kar dena chahiye.
options.C: Usse bachne ki koshish karni chahiye ya senior ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Team conflicts ko avoid karna chahiye, aur agar wo badh rahe hain toh turant senior ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek achhe 'team player' ki kya quality hoti hai?

options.B: Dusron ke ideas ko respect karna aur unke saath kaam karna.

questions.explanation: Ek achha team player dusron ke ideas ko respect karta hai aur unke saath milkar kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Apne 'reporting officer' ko regularly update karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unko pareshan karne ke liye.
options.B: Taki unko situation ka pata rahe aur wo sahi decisions le sakein.

questions.explanation: Regular reporting se senior officers ko ground situation ka pata rehta hai aur wo zaroori actions le sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek security professional mein 'adaptability' (badlav ke anukool hona) kyun important hai?

options.A: Kyunki security rules kabhi nahi badalte.
options.B: Situations aur rules badalte rehte hain, toh uske hisab se adjust karne ke liye.
options.C: Isse kaam mushkil ho jata hai.

questions.explanation: Security sector dynamic hota hai, rules aur situations badalte rehte hain. Adaptability se professional in badlavo ke anukool ho pata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki team mein koi member perform nahi kar raha hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Uski burai karni chahiye.
options.C: Politely usse baat karni chahiye ya senior ko inform karna chahiye.
options.D: Uska kaam khud kar dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar koi team member theek se perform nahi kar raha hai, toh usse calmly baat karni chahiye ya senior ko inform karna chahiye, taki sahi action liya ja sake.

questions.question: 'Delegation' (kaam soumpna) leadership mein kya role play karta hai?

options.A: Leader ko saara kaam khud karna chahiye.
options.B: Kaam ko efficiently distribute karna aur team members ko empower karna.
options.C: Sirf mushkil kaam dusron ko dena.

questions.explanation: Delegation mein leader tasks ko efficiently team members mein distribute karta hai, jisse unki skills develop hoti hain aur kaam jaldi hota hai.

questions.question: Ek security team ko 'briefing' (jaankari dena) kyun di jati hai?

options.B: Din ke tasks, special instructions aur updates dene ke liye.
options.C: Personal baatein discuss karne ke liye.
options.D: Sirf senior ki baat sunne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Briefing mein team ko din ke tasks, important updates, aur special instructions di jaati hain, taki sab log align ho sakein.

questions.question: Cross-functional teamwork ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek department ke logon ke saath kaam karna.
options.B: Alag-alag departments ke logon ke saath milkar kaam karna.
options.C: Dusron ke department mein interfere karna.
options.D: Sirf apne kaam se matlab rakhna.

questions.explanation: Cross-functional teamwork mein alag-alag departments ya areas ke log ek common goal ke liye saath milkar kaam karte hain.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'accountability' (jawabdehi) kyun maintain karni chahiye?

options.B: Apne actions aur decisions ki zimmedari lene ke liye.
options.C: Dusron ko blame karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Accountability ka matlab hai apne actions, decisions aur unke results ki zimmedari lena, jo professionalism ki nishani hai.

questions.question: Security work mein stress ke common sources kya hain?

options.B: Long shifts, high-pressure situations aur unforeseen incidents.

questions.explanation: Lambe shifts, high-pressure situations, aur unexpected incidents security professionals ke liye stress ke common sources hain.

questions.question: Stress ko manage karne ke liye ek simple technique kya hai?

options.B: Deep breathing exercises karna.

questions.explanation: Deep breathing exercises stress ko kam karne aur mind ko calm karne mein help karti hain.

questions.question: Physical well-being (sharirik swasthya) security professional ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Duty par alert aur energetic rehne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Achha physical health security professionals ko duty par alert, energetic aur effective rehne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Stress ke signs kya ho sakte hain?

options.B: Irritability, neend na aana aur concentration mein kami.

questions.explanation: Stress ke physical aur psychological signs mein irritability, insomnia aur concentration ki kami shamil ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Apne 'composure' (shanti) ko pressure mein kaise maintain karein?

options.B: Deep breaths lekar aur situation ko objectively analyze karke.

questions.explanation: Pressure mein composure maintain karne ke liye shant rehna, deep breathing karna aur situation ko logical tareeke se analyze karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Mental well-being (mansik swasthya) security professional ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Sahi decisions lene aur challenging situations ko handle karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Achha mental health security professionals ko sahi decisions lene aur stressful ya challenging situations ko effectively handle karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko regular 'breaks' kyun lene chahiye?

options.B: Mind ko fresh rakhne aur burnout se bachne ke liye.
options.C: Dusron ko kaam karte dekhne ke liye.
options.D: Apne colleagues se baat karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Regular breaks mind ko fresh karte hain aur burnout (thakawat) se bachate hain, jisse performance achhi rehti hai.

questions.question: 'Emotional intelligence' (bhawnatmak samajhdari) stress management mein kaise help karti hai?

options.B: Apni aur dusron ki emotions ko samajhkar aur manage karke.
options.C: Sirf dusron ki emotions ko control karke.

questions.explanation: Emotional intelligence apni aur dusron ki emotions ko samajhne aur manage karne mein help karti hai, jisse stress ko behtar tareeke se handle kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko lagta hai ki aapko stress ke liye professional help ki zaroorat hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne senior ya HR se baat karni chahiye.
options.C: Sirf doston se baat karni chahiye.
options.D: Social media par post karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar aapko stress ke liye professional help ki zaroorat feel hoti hai, toh apne senior ya HR department se baat karna ek positive step hai.

questions.question: Duty ke baad 'relaxation activities' (aram ki gatividhiyan) mein kya shamil ho sakta hai?

options.A: Office ke kaam ko ghar le jana.
options.B: Hobby pursue karna, family ke saath time bitana ya exercise karna.

questions.explanation: Duty ke baad hobbies, family time, aur physical activity jaise relaxation activities stress ko kam karne mein help karti hain.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'sleep deprivation' (neend ki kami) se kya nuksan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Reaction time slow hona, decision-making mein galti aur alertness mein kami.

questions.explanation: Neend ki kami se reaction time slow ho sakta hai, decision-making mein galti ho sakti hai aur overall alertness kam ho jati hai, jo security work ke liye dangerous hai.

questions.question: 'Mindfulness' (sachetata) stress management mein kaise help karti hai?

options.B: Present moment par focus karke aur judgments avoid karke.

questions.explanation: Mindfulness mein present moment par dhyan dena aur bina kisi judgment ke apni thoughts aur feelings ko observe karna shamil hai, jo stress ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Apne 'boundaries' (seemaon) ko set karna stress management mein kaise help karta hai?

options.B: Work-life balance maintain karke aur personal time ko protect karke.

questions.explanation: Apni boundaries set karne se aap work-life balance maintain kar sakte hain aur apne personal time ko protect kar sakte hain, jisse stress kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'self-care' (apna khayal rakhna) kyun practice karna chahiye?

options.B: Taki wo apni duties effectively perform kar sakein aur burnout na ho.
options.C: Isse kaam mein der hoti hai.

questions.explanation: Self-care security professionals ke liye zaroori hai, taki wo physically aur mentally fit rahein aur apni duties ko effectively perform kar sakein.

questions.question: Agar aapko 'fatigue' (thakawat) feel ho rahi hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Rest lena chahiye aur apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye.
options.C: Apne aap ko push karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar aapko fatigue feel ho rahi hai, toh rest lena aur apne supervisor ko inform karna zaroori hai, taki aapki performance par asar na pade.

questions.question: Apne 'support system' (madad karne wale log) ka use karna stress management mein kaise help karta hai?

options.A: Sirf apne doston se baat karke.
options.B: Family, friends aur colleagues se baat karke aur emotional support lekar.

questions.explanation: Apne support system (family, friends, colleagues) se baat karna aur emotional support lena stress ko manage karne mein bahut help karta hai.

questions.question: Ethics ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Sahi aur galat ke principles, jo aapke actions ko guide karte hain.
options.D: Apne fayde ke liye kaam karna.

questions.explanation: Ethics wo moral principles hain jo aapke actions ko guide karte hain aur batate hain ki kya sahi hai aur kya galat.

questions.question: Security professional ke liye 'integrity' (imandari) kyun important hai?

options.B: Trust aur credibility maintain karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf jab koi dekh raha ho.

questions.explanation: Integrity security professionals ke liye bahut important hai, kyunki isse unpar trust banta hai aur unki credibility maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Confidential information (gupt jaankari) ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf 'need-to-know' basis par share karna chahiye aur uski privacy maintain karni chahiye.
options.C: Social media par post karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Confidential information ko sirf un logon ke saath share karna chahiye jinhe uski zaroorat hai, aur uski privacy maintain karni chahiye.

questions.question: Ek 'ethical dilemma' (naitik dvidha) ko kaise solve karna chahiye?

options.B: Rules, policies aur apne moral principles ko consider karke.

questions.explanation: Ethical dilemma ko solve karte samay rules, policies aur apne moral principles ko dhyan mein rakhna chahiye, taki sahi decision liya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi 'bribe' offer karta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant reject karna chahiye aur apne senior ko report karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Bribe ko turant reject karna chahiye aur apne senior ko inform karna chahiye, kyunki yeh illegal aur unethical hai.

questions.question: Problem-solving process ka pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Problem ko clearly define karna aur samajhna.

questions.explanation: Problem-solving ka pehla step hai problem ko clearly define karna aur usko achhe se samajhna.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'bias' (pakshpat) se kyun bachna chahiye?

options.B: Fair aur objective decisions lene ke liye.

questions.explanation: Bias se bachna zaroori hai, taki security professionals fair aur objective decisions le sakein, bina kisi bhedbhav ke.

questions.question: Agar aapko duty par koi 'lost item' milta hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usko apne paas rakh lena chahiye.
options.B: Usko turant lost and found department ya senior ko submit karna chahiye.
options.C: Usko dustbin mein fenk dena chahiye.

questions.explanation: Lost items ko turant lost and found department ya senior ko submit karna chahiye, yeh imandari ki nishani hai.

questions.question: 'Critical thinking' (vivekpoorn soch) problem-solving mein kaise help karti hai?

options.B: Information ko analyze karke aur logical conclusions tak pahunchkar.
options.D: Jaldi se koi bhi decision lekar.

questions.explanation: Critical thinking mein information ko analyze karna, facts ko evaluate karna aur logical conclusions tak pahunchna shamil hai, jo effective problem-solving ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Decision-making mein 'consequences' (parinam) ko consider karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Isse decision lene mein der hoti hai.
options.B: Taki aapke decision ke positive aur negative impacts ko samajh sakein.

questions.explanation: Decisions lene se pehle unke consequences ko consider karna zaroori hai, taki aapko apne actions ke positive aur negative impacts ka pata ho.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi 'irregularity' (gadbadi) ya suspicious activity dikhti hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne doston ko bata dena chahiye.
options.C: Turant apne supervisor ko report karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi irregularity ya suspicious activity ko turant apne supervisor ko report karna security protocol ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'confidentiality' (gopniyata) kyun maintain karni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf apni baatein chhupane ke liye.
options.B: Client, employees aur organization ki privacy aur trust maintain karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Confidentiality maintain karna client, employees aur organization ki privacy aur trust ko banaye rakhne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Problem-solving mein 'brainstorming' (vichar-vimarsh) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf ek idea par focus karna.
options.B: Multiple solutions generate karna aur creative thinking ko badhawa dena.
options.D: Dusron ke ideas ko reject karna.

questions.explanation: Brainstorming se multiple solutions generate hote hain aur creative thinking ko badhawa milta hai, jo effective problem-solving ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek security professional ko 'professional conduct' (peshevar aacharan) kyun maintain karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf apne aap ko achha dikhane ke liye.
options.B: Organization ki reputation aur public trust ko uphold karne ke liye.
options.C: Dusron ko impress karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Professional conduct maintain karna organization ki reputation ko banaye rakhta hai aur public trust ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi 'unethical request' milti hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko politely reject karna chahiye aur apne senior ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Unethical request ko politely reject karna chahiye aur apne senior ko inform karna chahiye, taki sahi action liya ja sake.

questions.question: Apne 'duty of care' (dekhbhal ka kartavya) ko nibhana ethics mein kya darshata hai?

options.A: Sirf apne aap ka khayal rakhna.
options.B: Dusron ki safety aur well-being ki zimmedari lena.

questions.explanation: Duty of care ka matlab hai dusron ki safety aur well-being ki zimmedari lena, jo security professional ke ethical responsibilities ka hissa hai.
